query:
SELECT 
  outletId,
  orderType,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(totalAmount)/100 as total_amount_rupees,
  SUM(centralGst)/100 as total_cgst_rupees,
  SUM(stateGst)/100 as total_sgst_rupees
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-04-01' 
  AND createdAt < '2026-05-01' 
  AND orderStatus != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY outletId, orderType
ORDER BY outletId, orderType;

  SUM(totalAmount)/100 as total_amount_rupees,

FROM orders
